title: heliotropium undulatum var. crispum
intro: Heliotropium undulatum var. crispum, also known as the crinkled heliotrope or crinkled turnsole, is a variety of the Heliotropium undulatum plant, which is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Heliotropium undulatum var. crispum include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
